'''Alek Ben-Faris''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was one of [[House Pelagia]]'s greatest diplomats and advisers during the Clone Wars. He was a native of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal]].
